subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual person and heavenly man—may God confirm thee! Know, that the divine springtime hath come
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الشخص الروحانی و الانسان الملکوتی ایدک الله اعلم ان الربیع الالهی اقبل بغیثه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
